summary: Tested all 14 blog posts for mid-CTA (dark navy background + orange left border) and related articles sections. 13/14 blog posts fully pass all criteria. The 14th blog post (/blog/repair-vs-replace) is actually mounted at /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace and works correctly — the test spec URL was incorrect. Additionally, 3 blog posts have broken internal links pointing to /blog/repair-vs-replace (wrong URL, 404) in their related-articles sections instead of /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace.

integration_issues.flow: Broken internal links in related articles
integration_issues.issue: 3 blog posts have related-article cards pointing to /blog/repair-vs-replace (404, wrong URL). Should link to /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace. Affected files: ApplianceRepairCostSanFrancisco.js (line 248), ApplianceLifespan.js (line 392), EnergyEfficientAppliances.js (line 358).

action_items: Fix broken internal links in 3 blog posts: In ApplianceRepairCostSanFrancisco.js (line 248), ApplianceLifespan.js (line 392), and EnergyEfficientAppliances.js (line 358) — change href from '/blog/repair-vs-replace' to '/blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace'.
Note for test spec: The 14th blog post URL listed in the spec as /blog/repair-vs-replace is actually routed at /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace (verified working with all correct features)
critical_code_review_comments: 3 blog posts have related article links to /blog/repair-vs-replace which returns 404. Correct URL is /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace as defined in App.js router
No other code quality issues found — all 14 mid-CTAs and related-articles sections are correctly implemented

success_rate.frontend: 13/14 blog posts pass all requirements (93%). The 14th /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace also passes — test spec URL was wrong (/blog/repair-vs-replace vs actual /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace)

verification_results.mid_cta_heading_correct: PASS - all 14 blogs: 'Need appliance repair in San Francisco?'
verification_results.mid_cta_subtext_correct: PASS - all 14 blogs: 'Same-day service · $60 diagnostic · 180-day warranty'
verification_results.related_articles_2_to_3_cards: PASS - all 14 blogs have 2-3 cards with 'Read article →'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 blog posts have correct mid-CTAs (dark navy #0D1B2A bg, orange #FF5722 left border) and related-articles sections. Only outstanding issue: 3 blog posts (ApplianceRepairCostSanFrancisco, ApplianceLifespan, EnergyEfficientAppliances) have broken internal links to /blog/repair-vs-replace (404) in their related-articles — should be /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace. The RepairVsReplace component is routed at /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace NOT /blog/repair-vs-replace.
rca_of_issue: The blog route for RepairVsReplace is defined in App.js as '/blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace'. However, when the 3 blog posts (ApplianceRepairCostSanFrancisco, ApplianceLifespan, EnergyEfficientAppliances) had their related-articles sections added, the href was set to '/blog/repair-vs-replace' (shortened version) instead of the actual route '/blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace'. This causes a 404 + redirect to the blog listing page when users click those related article cards. Fix: change the 3 wrong hrefs to '/blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace'.
